message:
Fix critical bugs found in context management review

H1: Prevent invalid message ordering after L3/L4 compaction by
    adjusting cutoff to never start preserved turns on a TurnTool.
H2: Fix parseExitCode to handle masked format (exit N) and match
    shell results by ToolCallID instead of grabbing first TurnTool.
    Also respect cutoff boundary in checkpoint shell search.
H4: Truncate Layer 4 summarization prompt to ~50k chars to avoid
    exceeding the cheap model's context window.
H5: Replace unreliable context-cancellation error test with
    errorAdapter that deterministically returns errors.
M1: Skip checkpoint/summary messages when extracting original task,
    and parse original task from previous checkpoint text.
M2: Sort tool names for deterministic checkpoint output.
M5: Add test for apply_patch file extraction in checkpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
